keyEvents.text: Goal!  Anguilla 0, Suriname 1. Tyrone Conraad (Suriname) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jaden Montnor.
Stefano Denswil (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Suriname. Shaquille Pinas replaces Anfernee Dijksteel.
Justin Lonwijk (Suriname) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Anguilla. Mekhi Connor replaces Aedan Scipio because of an injury.
Substitution, Anguilla. Delani Francis replaces Kyle Lake-Bryan.

Substitution, Suriname. Sheraldo Becker replaces Djevencio van der Kust.
Substitution, Suriname. Jeredy Hilterman replaces Justin Lonwijk.

Substitution, Anguilla. Cardinaé Rennie replaces Lamar Carpenter.
Substitution, Anguilla. Jared Smeins replaces Kayne Connor.

Substitution, Suriname. Gyrano Kerk replaces Tyrone Conraad because of an injury.
